title: trichophyllum cylindricum
intro: Trichophyllum cylindricum, also known as Trichophyllum, is a genus of liverwort, a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the class Bryophyta. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Trichophyllum cylindricum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Trichophyllum cylindricum can be prepared as an herbal tea or supplement, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats.
